name: Jack Daniel's Apple
additiveDetail: Liker: dodana aroma jabuke i secer (35%)

notes.hr: Liker na bazi Tennessee whiskeyja s aromom zelene jabuke (35%). Po EU pravilima liker, ne whisky — deklariramo neutralno.
notes.en: A Tennessee-whiskey-based liqueur with green apple flavour (35%). Legally a liqueur, not whisky, under EU rules — declared neutrally.
